title: Karpathy Bigram explained in 10min..
summary: A 10-minute video tutorial explaining bigram language models as a foundational building block for understanding larger language models like GPT. The content covers tokenization, embeddings, loss functions, and training mechanics including backpropagation and the AdamW optimizer.
writeup: This 10-minute tutorial from Caleb Writes Code walks through the bigram language model as a foundational step toward understanding larger systems like GPT. It covers tokenization, embeddings, and loss functions, along with the training mechanics of backpropagation and the AdamW optimizer. The framing matters because the bigram model isolates core mechanisms (logits, softmax, and cross entropy) that scale up into full language models.
